name: pandoshare-agent
description: Pandoshare GUI-capable agent runtime skeleton inspired by Claude Code architecture.

scripts.model:test: npm run build -- --pretty false && node scripts/model-smoke.mjs
scripts.model:test:online: npm run build -- --pretty false && node scripts/model-smoke.mjs --online
scripts.agent:turn: npm run build -- --pretty false && node scripts/agent-turn.mjs
scripts.agent:tool-smoke: npm run build -- --pretty false && node scripts/agent-tool-smoke.mjs
scripts.harness:smoke: npm run build -- --pretty false && node scripts/harness-smoke.mjs
scripts.events:smoke: npm run build -- --pretty false && node scripts/event-protocol-smoke.mjs
scripts.context-builder:smoke: npm run build -- --pretty false && node scripts/context-builder-smoke.mjs
scripts.compact:smoke: npm run build -- --pretty false && node scripts/compact-smoke.mjs
scripts.tool-result-storage:smoke: npm run build -- --pretty false && node scripts/tool-result-storage-smoke.mjs
scripts.token-budget:smoke: npm run build -- --pretty false && node scripts/token-budget-smoke.mjs
scripts.cli-entry:smoke: npm run build -- --pretty false && node scripts/cli-entry-smoke.mjs
scripts.doctor:smoke: npm run build -- --pretty false && node scripts/doctor-smoke.mjs
scripts.mcp-client:smoke: npm run build -- --pretty false && node scripts/mcp-client-smoke.mjs
scripts.dingxu-mcp:smoke: npm run build -- --pretty false && node scripts/dingxu-mcp-smoke.mjs
scripts.gui-tool:smoke: npm run build -- --pretty false && node scripts/gui-tool-smoke.mjs
scripts.gui-live:smoke: npm run build -- --pretty false && node scripts/gui-live-smoke.mjs
scripts.gateway:smoke: npm run build -- --pretty false && node scripts/gateway-smoke.mjs
scripts.goal-store:smoke: npm run build -- --pretty false && node scripts/goal-store-smoke.mjs
scripts.thread-store:smoke: npm run build -- --pretty false && node scripts/thread-store-smoke.mjs
scripts.thread-commands:smoke: npm run build -- --pretty false && node scripts/thread-commands-smoke.mjs
scripts.loop-runtime:smoke: npm run build -- --pretty false && node scripts/loop-runtime-smoke.mjs
scripts.permissions:smoke: npm run build -- --pretty false && node scripts/permissions-smoke.mjs
scripts.terminal-approval:smoke: npm run build -- --pretty false && node scripts/terminal-approval-smoke.mjs
scripts.tools:smoke: npm run build -- --pretty false && node scripts/tools-smoke.mjs
scripts.task-tools:smoke: npm run build -- --pretty false && node scripts/advanced-tools-smoke.mjs task
scripts.web-tools:smoke: npm run build -- --pretty false && node scripts/advanced-tools-smoke.mjs web
scripts.lsp-tool:smoke: npm run build -- --pretty false && node scripts/advanced-tools-smoke.mjs lsp
scripts.skill-tool:smoke: npm run build -- --pretty false && node scripts/advanced-tools-smoke.mjs skill
scripts.mcp-resource-tools:smoke: npm run build -- --pretty false && node scripts/advanced-tools-smoke.mjs mcp
scripts.ask-user-tool:smoke: npm run build -- --pretty false && node scripts/advanced-tools-smoke.mjs ask
scripts.schedule-tools:smoke: npm run build -- --pretty false && node scripts/advanced-tools-smoke.mjs schedule
scripts.notebook-tool:smoke: npm run build -- --pretty false && node scripts/advanced-tools-smoke.mjs notebook
scripts.tool-permissions:smoke: npm run build -- --pretty false && node scripts/advanced-tools-smoke.mjs permissions
scripts.tool-events:smoke: npm run build -- --pretty false && node scripts/advanced-tools-smoke.mjs events
scripts.advanced-tools:smoke: npm run build -- --pretty false && node scripts/advanced-tools-smoke.mjs all
scripts.serve:smoke: npm run build -- --pretty false && npm run web:build && node scripts/serve-smoke.mjs
scripts.approval-web:smoke: npm run build -- --pretty false && npm run web:build && node scripts/approval-web-smoke.mjs
scripts.stability:smoke: npm run build -- --pretty false && npm run web:build && node scripts/stability-runner.mjs --label smoke --duration-ms 2500 --monitor-interval-ms 250 --heartbeat-interval-ms 100
scripts.stability:1h: npm run build -- --pretty false && npm run web:build && node scripts/stability-runner.mjs --label 1h --duration-ms 3600000 --monitor-interval-ms 30000 --heartbeat-interval-ms 5000 --keep-workspace
scripts.stability:10h: npm run build -- --pretty false && npm run web:build && node scripts/stability-runner.mjs --label 10h --duration-ms 36000000 --monitor-interval-ms 60000 --heartbeat-interval-ms 10000 --keep-workspace
